facts.text: Case subject: sample tray ST-125, version v1, under screening check.
Screen S-2 compares against reference panel RP-A; RP-A's stated refresh interval is 60 days; RP-A was last updated on 2025-11-11.
Screen S-2 was run on 2026-05-12 per its manual; the step log matches the manual.
An independent assay on 2026-05-14 also reported NEGATIVE.
The draft completion statement declares screening complete on the S-2 result.
